commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Mattermost message-send plumbing for filePath/path, base64 buffer, structured attachments, mediaReadFile/mediaLocalRoots forwarding, and send tests.

PR surface: Source +157, Tests +145. Total +302 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main only forwards params.media for Mattermost send, and the linked issue includes redacted live evidence of ok:true with empty file_ids for filePath/attachments/buffer shapes. I did not run a live Mattermost repro in this read-only review.
